positive: Minimalist geometric forest silhouette, featuring stylized trees, mountain ranges, and winding forest paths formed by negative space. The scene should be composed with clean, solid black shapes against a crisp, pale cream background. Use a strong graphic design style with high contrast and defined, vector-like edges. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, suitable for repeating apparel print. Include elements like stylized deer leaping across the scene and abstract celestial elements (crescents, stars). Highly detailed, crisp line work, screen-printed quality.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, artifact, noise, grain, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, copyrighted, messy, photographic, photorealism
